title: Singleplayer
description: Gets rid of all those pesky extra buttons on the title screen.
body:
# Singleplayer Simplifies Minecraft. Hi! I won't be actively porting to any new versions, so if there's a version you'd like to see, open an [issue on GitHub](https://github.com/midnightdoggo19/singleplayer/issues)! In our modern lives, we are often bombarded by choices. Simple solution: remove them. You can now only click the singleplayer, options, and exit game buttons on the title screen. That is just about all this does.

Breaks Modmenu (just on the title screen) as well, so at least we have that.
